SELECT i1.is_active, i1.last_name, i1.first_name, i1.hire_date FROM instructors AS i1 WHERE i1.id IN (SELECT sub_r.principal_investigator_id FROM research_projects AS sub_r WHERE sub_r.principal_investigator_id < 160)
SELECT a1.id, a1.title FROM assignments AS a1 WHERE a1.id < 958 UNION SELECT a2.id, a2.title FROM assignments AS a2 WHERE a2.max_score > 537 LIMIT 43

SELECT s1.instructor_id, s1.semester, s1.id FROM sections AS s1 WHERE s1.course_id <= 310 UNION SELECT s2.instructor_id, s2.semester, s2.id FROM sections AS s2 WHERE s2.room_number LIKE '%a%' ORDER BY instructor_id LIMIT 46

SELECT s1.email, s1.first_name, s1.last_name FROM students AS s1 WHERE s1.id < 821 UNION SELECT s2.email, s2.first_name, s2.last_name FROM students AS s2 WHERE s2.email <> 'user22@example.com' ORDER BY email

SELECT a1.max_score, a1.due_date, a1.title, a1.id FROM assignments AS a1 WHERE a1.due_date > DATETIME('now', '-15 days') UNION ALL SELECT a2.max_score, a2.due_date, a2.title, a2.id FROM assignments AS a2 WHERE a2.id <> 682
SELECT i1.id, i1.first_name FROM instructors AS i1 WHERE i1.salary <= 292 UNION SELECT i2.id, i2.first_name FROM instructors AS i2 WHERE i2.first_name <> 'user' ORDER BY id
SELECT d1.is_active, d1.id FROM departments AS d1 WHERE d1.id >= 803 UNION SELECT d2.is_active, d2.id FROM departments AS d2 WHERE d2.budget <= 698

SELECT s1.assignment_id, s1.score FROM submissions AS s1 WHERE s1.score > 740 UNION ALL SELECT s2.assignment_id, s2.score FROM submissions AS s2 WHERE s2.id >= 641 LIMIT 47

SELECT c1.course_code, c1.department_id, c1.is_active, c1.id FROM courses AS c1 WHERE c1.course_code <> 'user' UNION ALL SELECT c2.course_code, c2.department_id, c2.is_active, c2.id FROM courses AS c2 WHERE c2.course_code = 'user' ORDER BY course_code
SELECT d1.budget, d1.chair_id FROM departments AS d1 WHERE d1.building <> 'test' UNION SELECT d2.budget, d2.chair_id FROM departments AS d2 WHERE d2.building LIKE '%c' LIMIT 37
SELECT i1.id, i1.hire_date FROM instructors AS i1 WHERE i1.department_id <= 398 UNION ALL SELECT i2.id, i2.hire_date FROM instructors AS i2 WHERE i2.is_active = 1

SELECT s1.course_id, s1.id, s1.room_number, s1.capacity FROM sections AS s1 WHERE s1.id < 819 UNION SELECT s2.course_id, s2.id, s2.room_number, s2.capacity FROM sections AS s2 WHERE s2.schedule_time <> 'user' ORDER BY course_id
SELECT s1.id, s1.assignment_id FROM submissions AS s1 WHERE s1.score <= 342 UNION SELECT s2.id, s2.assignment_id FROM submissions AS s2 WHERE s2.id <= 606

SELECT s1.submitted_at, s1.feedback, s1.assignment_id, s1.id FROM submissions AS s1 WHERE s1.score >= 863 UNION ALL SELECT s2.submitted_at, s2.feedback, s2.assignment_id, s2.id FROM submissions AS s2 WHERE s2.student_id < 507

SELECT s1.score, s1.student_id, s1.submitted_at FROM submissions AS s1 WHERE s1.assignment_id < 461 UNION SELECT s2.score, s2.student_id, s2.submitted_at FROM submissions AS s2 WHERE s2.assignment_id = 531

SELECT r1.description, r1.start_date FROM research_projects AS r1 WHERE r1.status = 'admin' UNION ALL SELECT r2.description, r2.start_date FROM research_projects AS r2 WHERE r2.department_id < 652 ORDER BY description LIMIT 27
SELECT d1.building, d1.chair_id, d1.budget, d1.id FROM departments AS d1 WHERE d1.id <= 101 UNION ALL SELECT d2.building, d2.chair_id, d2.budget, d2.id FROM departments AS d2 WHERE d2.chair_id > 441

SELECT s1.student_id, s1.score, s1.assignment_id, s1.id FROM submissions AS s1 WHERE s1.submitted_at < DATETIME('now', '-19 days') UNION SELECT s2.student_id, s2.score, s2.assignment_id, s2.id FROM submissions AS s2 WHERE s2.score <= 327 ORDER BY student_id

SELECT s1.id, s1.is_full_time, s1.enrollment_year, s1.gpa FROM students AS s1 WHERE s1.id > 430 UNION ALL SELECT s2.id, s2.is_full_time, s2.enrollment_year, s2.gpa FROM students AS s2 WHERE s2.email LIKE 'user%@%'

SELECT s1.id, s1.capacity, s1.room_number, s1.instructor_id FROM sections AS s1 WHERE s1.schedule_time = 'test' UNION SELECT s2.id, s2.capacity, s2.room_number, s2.instructor_id FROM sections AS s2 WHERE s2.course_id >= 710 ORDER BY id

SELECT a1.max_score, a1.title, a1.id FROM assignments AS a1 WHERE a1.due_date < DATETIME('now', '-6 days') UNION SELECT a2.max_score, a2.title, a2.id FROM assignments AS a2 WHERE a2.description LIKE '%a%' LIMIT 50

SELECT a1.max_score, a1.id, a1.description, a1.title FROM assignments AS a1 WHERE a1.section_id >= 503 UNION SELECT a2.max_score, a2.id, a2.description, a2.title FROM assignments AS a2 WHERE a2.due_date > DATETIME('now', '-27 days')
SELECT i1.rank, i1.salary FROM instructors AS i1 WHERE i1.first_name LIKE '%c' UNION SELECT i2.rank, i2.salary FROM instructors AS i2 WHERE i2.id < 384

SELECT e1.grade, e1.status, e1.enrolled_at, e1.section_id FROM enrollments AS e1 WHERE e1.section_id >= 597 UNION ALL SELECT e2.grade, e2.status, e2.enrolled_at, e2.section_id FROM enrollments AS e2 WHERE e2.grade <> 'test' LIMIT 22
SELECT s1.feedback, s1.submitted_at FROM submissions AS s1 WHERE s1.assignment_id <> 964 UNION ALL SELECT s2.feedback, s2.submitted_at FROM submissions AS s2 WHERE s2.id < 27 LIMIT 39
SELECT i1.first_name, i1.hire_date FROM instructors AS i1 WHERE i1.salary <> 478 UNION ALL SELECT i2.first_name, i2.hire_date FROM instructors AS i2 WHERE i2.id > 833
SELECT s1.is_full_time, s1.gpa FROM students AS s1 WHERE s1.first_name LIKE 'b%' UNION ALL SELECT s2.is_full_time, s2.gpa FROM students AS s2 WHERE s2.major <> 'test'

SELECT s1.major, s1.enrollment_year, s1.created_at FROM students AS s1 WHERE s1.last_name LIKE 'b%' UNION ALL SELECT s2.major, s2.enrollment_year, s2.created_at FROM students AS s2 WHERE s2.id <= 103 ORDER BY major
SELECT c1.is_active, c1.title, c1.department_id, c1.id FROM courses AS c1 WHERE c1.title = 'test' UNION SELECT c2.is_active, c2.title, c2.department_id, c2.id FROM courses AS c2 WHERE c2.id <> 867

SELECT r1.description, r1.end_date FROM research_projects AS r1 WHERE r1.end_date < DATETIME('now', '-30 days') UNION SELECT r2.description, r2.end_date FROM research_projects AS r2 WHERE r2.status <> 'user'

SELECT c1.department_id, c1.credits, c1.is_active, c1.title FROM courses AS c1 WHERE c1.is_active = 0 UNION ALL SELECT c2.department_id, c2.credits, c2.is_active, c2.title FROM courses AS c2 WHERE c2.course_code = '123' ORDER BY department_id

SELECT i1.department_id, i1.first_name, i1.salary, i1.last_name FROM instructors AS i1 WHERE i1.salary > 726 UNION ALL SELECT i2.department_id, i2.first_name, i2.salary, i2.last_name FROM instructors AS i2 WHERE i2.id = 63 ORDER BY department_id
SELECT s1.id, s1.score FROM submissions AS s1 WHERE s1.assignment_id < 440 UNION SELECT s2.id, s2.score FROM submissions AS s2 WHERE s2.feedback = 'test'
SELECT c1.level, c1.title FROM courses AS c1 WHERE c1.title LIKE '%a%' UNION ALL SELECT c2.level, c2.title FROM courses AS c2 WHERE c2.is_active = 0 LIMIT 47
SELECT c1.credits, c1.course_code FROM courses AS c1 WHERE c1.department_id <= 586 UNION SELECT c2.credits, c2.course_code FROM courses AS c2 WHERE c2.title LIKE '%c' ORDER BY credits LIMIT 30
SELECT c1.is_active, c1.credits, c1.title FROM courses AS c1 WHERE c1.course_code = 'admin' UNION ALL SELECT c2.is_active, c2.credits, c2.title FROM courses AS c2 WHERE c2.title LIKE 'b%'

SELECT r1.principal_investigator_id, r1.status, r1.description, r1.department_id FROM research_projects AS r1 WHERE r1.start_date > DATETIME('now', '-4 days') UNION SELECT r2.principal_investigator_id, r2.status, r2.description, r2.department_id FROM research_projects AS r2 WHERE r2.department_id < 447 ORDER BY principal_investigator_id LIMIT 24
SELECT e1.enrolled_at, e1.grade FROM enrollments AS e1 WHERE e1.grade = '123' UNION SELECT e2.enrolled_at, e2.grade FROM enrollments AS e2 WHERE e2.status = '123'

SELECT d1.is_active, d1.building, d1.name, d1.chair_id FROM departments AS d1 WHERE d1.id = 417 UNION ALL SELECT d2.is_active, d2.building, d2.name, d2.chair_id FROM departments AS d2 WHERE d2.is_active = 1

SELECT s1.enrollment_year, s1.email FROM students AS s1 WHERE s1.last_name <> 'activity' UNION ALL SELECT s2.enrollment_year, s2.email FROM students AS s2 WHERE s2.is_full_time = 1 ORDER BY enrollment_year
SELECT s1.student_id, s1.score, s1.submitted_at FROM submissions AS s1 WHERE s1.student_id = 928 UNION SELECT s2.student_id, s2.score, s2.submitted_at FROM submissions AS s2 WHERE s2.score = 466
SELECT e1.student_id, e1.section_id FROM enrollments AS e1 WHERE e1.student_id < 354 UNION ALL SELECT e2.student_id, e2.section_id FROM enrollments AS e2 WHERE e2.section_id > 645

SELECT e1.section_id, e1.student_id, e1.enrolled_at FROM enrollments AS e1 WHERE e1.status LIKE 'b%' UNION SELECT e2.section_id, e2.student_id, e2.enrolled_at FROM enrollments AS e2 WHERE e2.section_id <= 342

SELECT s1.gpa, s1.is_full_time, s1.major FROM students AS s1 WHERE s1.created_at < DATETIME('now', '-23 days') UNION SELECT s2.gpa, s2.is_full_time, s2.major FROM students AS s2 WHERE s2.enrollment_year = 677 LIMIT 13
